message:
refactor: migrate events and persona modules to structured slog logging

Continue the codebase-wide stderr to slog.Warn migration:

internal/events/logger.go:
- Log rotation error warnings
- Replay file open errors
- Replay scanner errors during log reading

internal/persona/prompt.go:
- Context file loading failures per persona
- Individual context file read errors
- TOML config parsing errors

Benefits of structured logging:
- Key-value pairs enable log aggregation and filtering
- Consistent with slog usage across the codebase
- Better context in error messages (persona name, file path, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
